etymology.description: 犬(犬) (quǎn, "dog") + ⺼(⺼) (ròu, "meat") = dog eating meat (ideogrammic compound) -> 猒 with evolution from 口 to 甘 and later to 日 -> modern form
etymology.interpretation: In its historical forms, the character depicted a dog consuming meat, representing satisfaction. Over time, the component representing the mouth transitioned from 口 to 甘 and then to 日, leading to the contemporary depiction with added phonetic approximations.
